name: newsweb-explain-feed
description: Short E24 Aksjelive-style news stories from company notices on Newsweb.

scripts.dev:deps: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis
scripts.dev:deps:down: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml stop postgres redis
scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/prompt-kit && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/worker" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/prompt-kit && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/worker && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/prompt-kit && npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w packages/prompt-kit && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/worker && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w packages/prompt-kit && npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/prompt-kit && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/worker
